isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID, A.BoardName BoardName, A.BoardName2 BoardName2, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder, A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.C_ClubNo C_ClubNo, A.Gubun FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN ( SELECT BoardID , AccessID , ACCESS_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(ParentBoardID) = UPPER(#v_pRootBoardID#) AND ACCESS_ = 1 AND write_FG = 'TRUE' AND boardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR AccessID = #v_pDeptID# OR AccessID = #v_pCompanyID# OR AccessID = 'EVERYONE' ) ) B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID, A.BoardName BoardName, A.BoardName2 BoardName2, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder, A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.C_ClubNo C_ClubNo, A.Gubun FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN ( SELECT BoardID, AccessID, ACCESS_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(ParentBoardID) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND ACCESS_ = 1 AND boardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR AccessID = #v_pDeptID# OR AccessID = #v_pCompanyID# OR AccessID = 'EVERYONE' ) ) B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.TENANTID_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID, A.BoardName, A.BoardName2, A.TreeViewOrder, A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.C_ClubNo C_ClubNo, A.Gubun FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A WHERE RTRIM(ParentBoardID) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NO, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_BOARD WHERE Tenant_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY WRITEDAY DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_KEYWORD#|| '%' OR CONTENT LIKE '%' ||#v_KEYWORD#|| '%'

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TITLE LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%'
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%'

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: ORDER BY REF DESC, STEP ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT TITLE, STEP, RE_LEVEL, REF, CHARFILENAME, READNUM, WRITEDAY, USERNAME, USERNAME2, ID, NO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TITLE, STEP, RE_LEVEL,REF, CHARFILENAME, READNUM, WRITEDAY, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, ID, NO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#

SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#
SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_CLUBNAME# AND C_CATE_A = #v_C_CATE_A# AND C_CATE_B = #v_C_CATE_B# AND C_CATE_C = #v_C_CATE_C# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C_Club.C_ClubNo, C_Club.C_RegDate, C_Club.C_ClubName, C_Club.C_ClubName2, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CATE_C, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_SYSOPID, C_MEMBERCNT, C_LOGO, C_CLUBDESC, C_CLUBBANNER, COMPANYID, ISIN, T1.ITEMCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) ITEMCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.BoardID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.BoardID AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUB.C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.C_ClubGubun, A.C_clubConfirmtype, B.permit FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER B ON A.C_ClubNo = B.C_ClubNo JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.C_ClubNo = C.C_ClubNo WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.BoardID BoardID, B.BOARDNAME BOARDNAME, A.ItemID, A.WriterID, A.WriterName, A.WriterDeptName, A.WriterCompanyName, A.WriteDate, A.StartDate, A.ParentWriteDate, A.Importance, A.Title, A.Attachments, A.ReadCount, A.ItemLevel, A.Abstract FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND P.GUBUN <> 3 WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.StartDate <= #v_pNow# AND A.EndDate > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.BoardID = A.BOARDID AND S.ItemID = A.ITEMID AND S.UserID = v_PUSERID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate DESC, A.UpperItemIDTree, A.StartDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BOARDID AS BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND P.GUBUN <> 3 WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND A.ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT USERID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.USERID = #v_pUserID# ) ) AND ROWNUM >= #v_pEndRow# ORDER BY #v_pSortBy#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND StartDate < #v_pNow# AND EndDate > #v_pNow# ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, A.STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_strLang$, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.TOTALCOUNT END READFLAG FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_strLang$ LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND TO_DATA(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_DATA(#v_pStartDate# || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TO_DATA(EndDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_DATA(#v_pEndDate# || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, A.STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT A.ITEMID, A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_strLang$, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.TOTALCOUNT END READFLAG FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME$v_STRLANG$, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID LIKE #v_PBOARDID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_strLang$ LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND TO_DATA(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_DATA(#v_pStartDate# || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TO_DATA(EndDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_DATA(#v_pEndDate# || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, A.STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT ItemID, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, WriterCompanyName, WriterCompanyName2, WriteDate, ParentWriteDate, Importance, Title, ContentLocation, StartDate, EndDate, Abstract, Attachments, UpperItemIDTree, ItemLevel, copiedItem, ExtensionAttribute1, ExtensionAttribute2, ExtensionAttribute3, ExtensionAttribute32, ExtensionAttribute4, ExtensionAttribute5 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE = #v_pParentWriteDate# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE >= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND ITEMID <> #v_pItemID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND ITEMID <> #v_previousItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND ITEMID <> #v_pItemID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.IMPORTANCE, B.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME$v_strLang$', A.ABSTRACT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME$v_strLang$, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.WRITERID = #v_pUserID# AND A.STARTDATE > #v_pNow#

SELECT REPLYID, USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$, USERID, CONTENT, WRITEDATE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND ITEMID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY WRITEDATE ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT UserID, UserName, UserName2, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, UserCompanyName, UserCompanyName2, UserTitle, UserTitle2, ReadDate FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ReadDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #v_pOrgItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pOrgBoardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #v_keyword# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_NO DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$ LIKE '%'|| #v_keyword# ||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_NO DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_NO DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT ID, USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$, C_NO, CONTENT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_NO) = #v_no# AND RTRIM(ID) = #v_userInfo_userID# AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND C_ID LIKE '%'||#v_keyword# ||'%' AND PERMIT IN (1,4) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_VISITED DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER, EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND C_MEMBERINFO.USERID = RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.C_ID) AND C_MEMBERINFO.USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$ LIKE '%'||#v_keyword#||'%' AND PERMIT IN (1,4) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_VISITED DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND PERMIT IN ( 1,4 ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_VISITED DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, EMAIL FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE USERID = #v_RECORD_C_SYSOPID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_NAME, C_CATE_A CATE, COUNT(C_CODE) CNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_a = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_A = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = #cat# AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_NAME, C_CATE_A
select.isNotEqual: SELECT C_NAME, C_CATE_B CATE, COUNT(C_CODE) CNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_b = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_B = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = #cat# AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_NAME, C_CATE_B

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUB.C_ClubNo, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_MEMBERCNT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_Club.C_ClubNo ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_a = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_Club.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_A = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_Club.C_ClubNo, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_MEMBERCNT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_Club.C_ClubNo ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_b = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_Club.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_B = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_MEMBERCNT, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.C_CLUBNO) AS ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB T1 JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND T1.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE $v_searchName$ LIKE '%' || #v_searchValue# || '%' AND T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) AS COPCNT FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_MEMBERCNT, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.C_CLUBNO) AS ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB T1 JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1. C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# WHERE $v_searchName$ LIKE '%' || #v_searchValue# || '%' AND T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.C_ClubGubun, A.C_clubConfirmtype , B.permit FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER B ON A.C_ClubNo = B.C_ClubNo AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.C_ClubNo = C.C_ClubNo AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TRIM(B.C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.procedure:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.STARTDATE DESC, A.DOCNO DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC
ORDER BY #v_PSORTBY#
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, STARTDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
sqlMap.procedure: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, STARTDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, SHOWPOSITION, SN, GUBUN FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND SHOWPOSITION != ' ' ORDER BY SN, SHOWPOSITION

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.BoardID, ITEMID, TITLE, WRITEDATE, GUBUN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.BoardID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.BoardID AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_COMM_ITEM.BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT C_SYSOPID, ISIN, COMPANYID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE ItemID = #v_pOrgItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , ITEMID , GUBUN , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITEDATE , TITLE , ITEMCNT , C_MEMBERCNT , C_CLUBNAME , C_CLUBNAME2 , A.BoardID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) ITEMCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_copNo# AND A.ParentBoardID != 'TOP' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT C_CLUBNAME , C_CLUBNAME2, C_MEMBERCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_copNo# AND C_Club.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T3 WHERE RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_copNo# AND A.ParentBoardID != 'TOP' AND B.StartDate <= #v_pNow# AND B.EndDate > #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.WriteDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY WHERE C_CAT = #cat# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CODE, C_ORDER
SELECT RTRIM(C_SYSOPID) FROM (SELECT C_SYSOPID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_CLUB.C_ClubNo DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_CLUB.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_CLUB.C_ClubNo DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_CLUB.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, ' ' DISPLAYNAME, ' ' DISPLAYNAME2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_Club.C_ClubNo DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(AccessID) TotalCount FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BoardAdmin_FG = 'TRUE' AND ( AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR AccessID = #v_pDeptID# OR AccessID = #v_pCompanyID# OR AccessID = 'everyone' ) AND BoardID = ( SELECT BoardGroupID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT Result FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_TREECACHE WHERE QUERY = #v_pRootBoardID# ||','|| #v_pUserID# ||','|| #v_pDeptID# ||','|| #v_pCompanyID# ||','|| #v_pMode# ||','|| #v_pSubFlag# ||','|| #v_pSelectBy# ||','|| #v_pExcludeBoardID# ||','|| #v_pClubNo# ||','|| #v_strLang# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNOTICETITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBBOARDTITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBBOARD1TITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBBOARD2TITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBPDSTITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.AspAdmin WHERE USERID = #v_STRUSERID# AND Tenant_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT FileName FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(MAX(#v_MAXIDFIELDNAME#),0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND C_CLUBNO = #v_CODE#

SELECT FILENAME FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE #v_MAXIDFIELDNAME# = #v_STRMAXNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND C_CLUBNO = #v_CODE#
SELECT COMPANYID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE COMPANYID = #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID# AND USERID = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT MAX(CLUBID) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_CLUBID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT "1" as "open", "user" FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "1" as "user", C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE C_ID = #v_PUSERID# AND
C_ClubUser.C_CLUBNO = #v_PCLUBNO#
C_ClubUser.C_CLUBNO = ( SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
) USER ON C_Club.c_CLUBNO = USER.c_CLUBNO WHERE C_CLUBGUBUN = '2' AND C_Club.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND
C_ClubUser.C_CLUBNO = #v_PCLUBNO#
C_Club.C_CLUBNO = ( SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
SELECT COUNT(ItemID) TotalCount FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND StartDate < #v_pNow# AND EndDate > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND TO_DATA(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_DATA(#v_pStartDate# || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TO_DATA(EndDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > TO_DATA(#v_pEndDate# || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A WHERE A.BOARDID LIKE #v_pBoardID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND STARTDATE > #v_pStartDate# || ' 00:00:00'
AND EndDate > #v_pEndDate# || ' 23:59:59'
SELECT NVL(COUNT(ItemID), 0) TotalCount FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE WriterID = #v_pUserID# AND StartDate > #v_pNow# AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM (SELECT T1.C_CLUBNO , WRITEDATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WRITEDATE DESC) ROWNUM_ FROM (SELECT DISTINCT C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo, MAX(WRITEDATE) WRITEDATE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_ClubUser JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club ON C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo = C_Club.C_ClubNo AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = C_Club.Tenant_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_BoardInfo ON TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.C_ClubNo = C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo AND TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID = C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_Item ON TBL_Comm_Item.BoardID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.BoardID AND TBL_Comm_Item.Tenant_ID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_ClubUser.C_ID) = #v_USERID# AND C_Club.C_adminConfirm = 'Y' AND C_ClubUser.PERMIT <> 0 AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo ) T1 ) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTART# AND #v_PEND#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT T1.C_CLUBNO FROM (SELECT C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo , C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_ClubUser.C_Visited DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_ClubUser JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club ON C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo = C_Club.C_ClubNo AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = C_Club.Tenant_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_ClubUser.C_ID) = #v_USERID# AND C_Club.C_adminConfirm = 'Y' AND PERMIT <> 0 AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_BoardInfo ON TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.C_ClubNo = T1.C_CLUBNO AND TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID = T1.Tenant_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_Item ON TBL_Comm_Item.BoardID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.BoardID AND TBL_Comm_Item.Tenant_ID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID GROUP BY T1.C_CLUBNO, TBL_Comm_Item.WriteDate

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCPASSWORD FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_BoardInfo JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_Item ON TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.BoardID = TBL_Comm_Item.BoardID AND TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID = TBL_Comm_Item.Tenant_ID WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_C_CLUBNO# AND TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(BoardID) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE ParentBoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(TITLE) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE (TITLE LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' OR CONTENT LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(TITLE) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TITLE LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(BOARDNO), 0) MAXBOARDNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_TREECACHE WHERE QUERY = #v_pRootBoardID# || ',' || #v_pUserID# || ',' || #v_pDeptID# || ',' || #v_pCompanyID# || ',' || #v_pMode# || ',' || #v_pSubFlag# || ',' || #v_pSelectBy# || ',' || #v_pExcludeBoardID# || ',' || #v_pClubNo# || ',' || #v_strLang# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_TREECACHE ( QUERY, Result, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pRootBoardID# || ',' || #v_pUserID# || ',' || #v_pDeptID# || ',' || #v_pCompanyID# || ',' || #v_pMode# || ',' || #v_pSubFlag# || ',' || #v_pSelectBy# || ',' || #v_pExcludeBoardID# || ',' || #v_pClubNo# || ',' || #v_strLang#, #v_result#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ SET TITLE = #v_TITLE#, CONTENT = #v_TEXTCONTENT#
, CHARFILENAME = #v_ATTACHLIST#
, CHARFILENAME = #v_ATTACHLIST#
WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND C_CLUBNO = #v_CODE#

UPDATE EZCOMMUNITY.$v_bName$ SET STEP = STEP + 1 WHERE REF=#v_myRef# AND STEP > #v_myStep# AND $v_bName$.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND C_CLUBNO = #v_code#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ ( COMPANYID, ID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, TITLE,
REF, STEP, RE_LEVEL,
REF, STEP, RE_LEVEL,
CHARFILENAME,
CHARFILENAME,
#v_MAXIDFIELDNAME#, CONTENT, READNUM, WRITEDAY, FILENAME, C_CLUBNO, TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID#, #v_USERINFO_USERID#, #v_USERINFO_DISPLAYNAME1#, #v_USERINFO_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_TITLE#
,#v_MYREF#, #v_NEWSTEP#, #v_NEWLEVEL#
,#v_MYREF#, #v_NEWSTEP#, #v_NEWLEVEL#
,#v_ATTACHLIST#
,#v_ATTACHLIST#
,#v_NUMBER#, #v_TEXTCONTENT#, 0, #v_DATETIME_NOW#, #v_FILENAME#, #v_CODE#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND C_CLUBNO = #v_CODE#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB ( C_CLUBNO, C_REGDATE, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CATE_C, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_ADMINCONFIRM, C_MAKER, C_SYSOPID, C_CLUBDESC, ISIN, C_LOGO, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBBANNER, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CODE#, #nowDateTime#, #v_CLUBNAME#, #v_CLUBNAME2#, #v_C_CATE_A#, #v_C_CATE_B#, #v_C_CATE_C#, #v_CLUBTYPE#, #v_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE#, 'N', #v_USERINFO_USERID#, #v_USERINFO_USERID#, #v_INTRO#, #v_ISIN#, #v_LOGO#, #v_LOGO_THUMBNAIL#, #v_BANNER#, #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO ( C_CLUBNO, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDGROUPID, ITEMEXPIRES, ATTACHSIZELIMIT, BOARDNO, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CODE#, #v_BOARDID#, #v_B_BOARD_NAME1#, #v_B_BOARD_NAME2#, #v_PARENTBOARDID#, NULL, -1, #v_ATTACHSIZELIMIT#, #v_BOARDNO#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_BOARDID#, #v_ACCESSID#, #v_ACCESSNAME#, #v_ACCESSLEVEL#, #v_ACCESS_#, #v_PARENTBOARDID#, #v_BOARDADMIN_FG#, #v_LISTVIEW_FG#, #v_READ_FG#, #v_WRITE_FG#, #v_REPLY_FG#, #v_DELETE_FG#, #v_INHERIT_FG#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER ( C_CLUBNO, C_ID, C_INDATE, C_EMAIL, C_HPHONE, C_COMPANY, C_HOUSE, C_JOB, C_BIRTH, C_SEX, PERMIT, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CODE#, #v_USERINFO_USERID#, #nowDateTime#, #v_OPENEMAIL#, #v_OPENHP#, #v_OPENCOMP#, #v_OPENHOUSE#, #v_OPENJOB#, #v_OPENBIRTH#, #v_OPENSEX#, #v_PERMIT#, #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ItemID) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE DocNo IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT MAX(DocNo) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM ( ItemID, BoardID, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterDeptID, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, WriterCompanyID, WriterCompanyName, WriterCompanyName2, WriteDate, ParentWriteDate, Importance, Title, ContentLocation, ReadCount, StartDate, EndDate, Abstract, Attachments, UpperItemIDTree, ItemLevel, CopiedItem, ExtensionAttribute1, ExtensionAttribute2, ExtensionAttribute3, ExtensionAttribute32, ExtensionAttribute4, ExtensionAttribute5, DocNo, DocPassWord, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pItemID#, #v_pBoardID#, #v_pWriterID#, #v_pWriterName#, #v_pWriterName2#, #v_pWriterDeptID#, #v_pWriterDeptName#, #v_pWriterDeptName2#, #v_pWriterCompanyID#, #v_pWriterCompanyName#, #v_pWriterCompanyName2#, #v_pWriteDate#, #v_pParentWriteDate#, #v_pImportance#, #v_pTitle#, #v_pContentLocation#, 0, #v_pStartDate#, #v_pEndDate#, #v_pAbstract#, #v_pAttachments#, #v_pUpperItemIDTree#, #v_pItemLevel#, 0, #v_pExtensionAttribute1#, #v_pExtensionAttribute2#, #v_pExtensionAttribute3#, #v_pExtensionAttribute32#, #v_pExtensionAttribute4#, #v_pExtensionAttribute5#, #v_pDocNo#, #v_pDocPassWord#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST (C_NO, ID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, COMPANYID, CONTENT, READNUM, WRITEDAY, C_CLUBNO) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(C_NO) , 0) + 1 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#), #v_USERINFO_USERID#, #v_USERINFO_DISPLAYNAME1#, #v_USERINFO_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID#, #v_MEMO#, 0, SYSDATE, #v_CODE#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(ID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_NO) = #c_no# AND TRIM(ID) = #userInfo_userID# AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST SET CONTENT = #memo# WHERE RTRIM(C_NO) = #c_no# AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND ACCESSID = #v_pAccessID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND rownum <= 1
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE QUESTIONID = #v_QUESTIONID# AND RTRIM(USERID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND RTRIM(USERID) = #v_C_ID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BOARDID || N';' AS BOARDID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLANSWER WHERE POLLQUESTIONID = #v_QUESTIONID# ORDER BY ANSWERNO
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY WHERE C_CAT=N'a' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CODE, C_ORDER
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY WHERE C_CAT=N'b' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CODE, C_ORDER
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY WHERE C_CAT=N'c' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CODE, C_ORDER
SELECT C_ID FROM ezCommunity.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_PCOMID# AND RTRIM(C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID#
SELECT boardid FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE QUESTIONID = #v_QUESTIONID# AND ANSWERID = #v_ANSWERID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE QUESTIONID = #v_QUESTIONID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER SET C_VISITED = C_VISITED + 1, C_LASTDATE = #STRNOW# WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #CODE# AND RTRIM(C_ID) = #ID#
UPDATE EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = #filePath# WHERE ITEMID = #itemID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLANSWER(ANSWERID, POLLQUESTIONID, ANSWERNO, ANSWERCONTENT) VALUES (EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLANSWER_ANSWERID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #v_POLLQUESTIONID#, #v_ANSWERNO#, #v_ANSWERCONTENT#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_NO) = #c_no# AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
